name: elemental-water-node
summary: A pocket of the Elemental Plane of Water. The chamber is a current-carved bubble in the endless sea, with kelp-like growths, coral pillars, and a drifting gravity that lets objects hang suspended.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rounded — currents don't favor right angles

accent.purpose: deep pool or current-channel at the center

primary_palette.note: a sphere of compressed pure water at the heart
a scrying pool used by marids

story_prompts: a marid court in session — pearls drift upward as offerings
the pool is being poisoned; a slow black bloom spreads through the coral
sahuagin raiders have staked the node and are hauling captives into the depths
empty, serene — a single bubble-pillar rising in perfect rhythm
a drowning portal has opened to the material plane, leaking salt water and dying fish

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: soft dim (0.35-0.5) with deep teal-blue; light shafts from above

anti_patterns: never use fire sources here — all light is bioluminescent or refracted
don't place cleanly rectangular props — coral/kelp growth is organic
use water fill liberally; the 'floor' is often only nominal
avoid warm colors — palette is teal, pearl, soft green, deep blue
